# Generated by Cookiecutter

```python
# ============================================================
# This file was generated by cookiecutter-templates/cookies/root.
# Please do not modify but update the cookiecutter.json and regenerate.
# For example additional resources to terraform should be added through further terraform files instead.
#
# @generated
# @version v3.3.79
# @see https://gitlab.breuni.de/itops/oct/cookiecutter/cookiecutter-templates
# ============================================================
```

## Usage

To regenerate edit the cookiecutter.json and execute the following command:

```bash
cookiecutter --replay-file cookiecutter.json --overwrite-if-exists \
    https://gitlab.breuni.de/itops/oct/cookiecutter/cookiecutter-templates \
    --checkout v3.3.79 \
    --directory cookies/root
```

To prevent some commonly modified files, for example .gitlab-ci.yml, to be overwritten, set `first_run` to `false`.

Please check all changes before committing as some files contain no extension point and could have been modified.
